error_signature: unable to change button background from gradient to solid
title: Button background color not changing from gradient to solid
symptom: The button remains in a gradient state even when it should change to a solid color on state change.
applies_when: Button is designed with a gradient background
not_this_if: Button background changes correctly in other states
root_cause: The button's background gradient is still bound to a variable, preventing it from changing to a solid color. The gradient needs to be unbound to allow for the solid color to display correctly.
fix_steps: Select the button in the editor
Go to the hover state settings
Unbind the gradient by clicking the unbind icon
Delete the gradient value to set it to none
agent_instruction: Unbind the gradient from the button's hover state to allow the solid color to show.
